# Arells

> Arells is on a mission to ensure investments never lose value. 

## Canonical URLs (production)

- https://arells.com/
- https://arells.com/bitcoin
- https://arells.com/ethereum
- https://arells.com/solana
- https://arells.com/about
- https://arells.com/vavity

## Machine-readable discovery

- Sitemap: https://arells.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://arells.com/robots.txt
